intro.h2Pre: NCC in Syracuse: Airport Transfers, Private Tours
intro.body1Rest: , your go-to partner for chauffeur-driven car services (NCC) across Sicily. We provide private transfers to and from all island airports — Catania, Comiso, Palermo, and Trapani — as well as connections to the ports of Pozzallo and Augusta. Travel in utmost comfort aboard our Mercedes Class V, GLB Premium, and Class E, with 24/7 service.
intro.body2: Discover our bespoke tours: explore the Baroque treasures of Noto, Modica, Ragusa Ibla, marvel at the lunar landscapes of Etna, stroll through historic Ortigia, and be captivated by the terraces of Taormina. Our service is ideal for weddings, corporate events, and exclusive travel experiences.

esperienze.subhead: Tested itineraries, with the places we've known for years. We start from Syracuse, or wherever you are.
esperienze.card1Body: Ortigia in a vintage 500, at walking pace.
esperienze.card2Body: Private sailing along Ortigia's coast, with Fratelli Burgio platter on board.
esperienze.card3Tag: Full day · south coast · Pura Vida Beach Club
esperienze.card3Body: Where Sicily ends and two seas meet. Sunset at Pura Vida.
esperienze.card4Tag: Full day · quad + wineries · Benanti, Palmeri
esperienze.card4Body: Silvestri craters at 1,900m, then two wineries who know us.
esperienze.card5Body: Three UNESCO World Heritage cities in one day, with the pauses that count.
esperienze.customTagline: Looking for something different? We build custom tours across all Sicily.

transferRapido.body: Catania, Comiso, Palermo. Port of Pozzallo. From Syracuse we leave straight away.

partnerSelezionati.subhead: We don't work with everyone. Every partner adds something to what you'll experience.
partnerSelezionati.card2Tag: Sicilian gourmet, platter on board the Silent Sailing
partnerSelezionati.card3Tag: Etna, one of the historic wineries

destinazioni.modica: Modica — alleys and chocolate from ancient tradition
destinazioni.ragusa: Ragusa Ibla — the cathedral and the views
destinazioni.etna: Etna — the volcano under the stars
destinazioni.taormina: Taormina — the terrace on the sea

listino.subhead: Base prices for Mercedes Class V (up to 7 passengers). Custom routes on quote.
listino.microcopy: Prices don't include highway tolls. Children up to 12 ride free with safety seat on request. Free waiting time at the airport up to 60 minutes.

about.body1: We started in Syracuse with a simple idea: moving around Sicily well shouldn't be a magazine-spread luxury.
about.body2: Since then we've driven tourists, brides and grooms, hotel guests, and families across eastern Sicily. Three locations, a Mercedes fleet kept like it's family, drivers who speak Italian and English — real English, not Google Translate.
about.body3: That's it. No brochure language, no promises of «excellence». The journey tells you.

differenziatori.item1Body: From €80 per route, fare agreed before you board. No hidden fees, no mysterious «night surcharge».
differenziatori.item2Body: Class V, GLB Premium, Class E. Weekly mechanical checks, sanitization after every ride. Cold water on board, always.
differenziatori.item3Body: Our drivers speak Italian and English fluently. They know the roads, the Mass schedules in Modica, and where to actually eat well in Ortigia.

ctaFinale.subhead: Three ways to tell us where to pick you up.

faq.q1: How much does a Catania airport transfer cost?
faq.a1: Prices start at €80 per route for NCC service with Mercedes Class V, depending on the route and number of passengers.
faq.q2: Can I book a Baroque tour for one day?
faq.a2: Yes: we offer 4–8 hour tours with optional guide; the itinerary is customizable and includes Noto, Modica, Ragusa Ibla.
faq.q3: Do you offer a private night taxi service?
faq.a3: Of course: our NCC is active 24/7, perfect for evening transfers to restaurants, events, or airports.
faq.q4: How many passengers fit in the Mercedes Class V?
faq.a4: Class V seats up to 7 passengers plus luggage. For smaller groups we offer Class E (sedan, up to 3 passengers) or GLB Premium (SUV, up to 4 passengers).
faq.q5: What if my flight is delayed?
faq.a5: We monitor all flight schedules in real time. The driver waits free of charge for up to 60 minutes from your landing time, even with flight delays.
faq.a6: Yes: we accept cash, credit card on board, and bank transfer for advance bookings (events, weddings, business).
faq.q7: Can I book for a group of 10-15 people?
faq.a7: Yes: we coordinate multiple cars from our fleet for larger groups. Message us on WhatsApp with the date, passengers, and route and we'll send a quote within the hour.

meta.title: Sicily NCC Services · Airport Transfers, Tours, Weddings, Business | Sicily Driver
meta.description: Our services at Sicily Driver Syracuse: airport transfers, private tours, weddings and events, business. Mercedes with English-speaking driver, 24/7 across eastern Sicily.

hero.subhead: Premium vehicles, professional drivers and tailor-made itineraries to explore Sicily in total comfort.

intro.body: At Sicily Driver Syracuse we offer four ways of being driven around eastern Sicily, with the same Mercedes fleet and the same chauffeurs throughout: point-to-point airport transfers, private day tours, wedding and event service, business solutions for companies and VIP guests.

cards.card1Body: Catania, Comiso, Palermo, Trapani. Pozzallo and Augusta. From €80 per route in Mercedes V-Class.
cards.card1Point3: Child seats at no extra cost
cards.card2Body: Baroque, Etna, Ortigia + Taormina. Tours customised on request. 6–9 hours with bespoke stops.
cards.card3Body: A dedicated fleet for the big day. V-Class for guests, E-Class for the couple.
cards.card4Body: Corporate transfers, conferences, VIP guests. Standard and electronic invoicing.
cards.card4Point3: Driver in jacket for formal occasions

fleet.card1Model: V-Class — the workhorse of the fleet
fleet.card1Comfort: Leather, AC, tinted windows, Wi-Fi on request
fleet.card2Comfort: High ride, panoramic, ideal for tours

areas.cities: Catania (and Fontanarossa), Taormina and Isola Bella, Ragusa Ibla, Modica, Comiso (and airport), Augusta, Pozzallo (cruise port), Avola, Pachino, Portopalo, the whole Val di Noto.
areas.airports: Airports: Catania Fontanarossa, Comiso, Palermo Falcone Borsellino, Trapani Birgi.

faq.q1: How much advance notice do you need?
faq.a1: For airport transfers, a WhatsApp message even 2 hours before is fine. For tours and weddings we recommend 7–15 days in advance to secure the right fleet.
faq.q2: Do you cover all of Sicily or only the east?
faq.a2: We operate primarily in eastern Sicily (provinces of Syracuse, Catania, Ragusa, southern Messina). For central or western Sicily we organise with more notice.
faq.q3: Only point-to-point transfers or hourly hire as well?
faq.a3: Both: point-to-point transfers and hourly hire (half day, full day) with car and driver at your disposal.
faq.q4: Can we pay by bank transfer in advance?
faq.a4: Yes, this is the preferred method for weddings, events, business and tours booked in advance. Cash and card accepted on board for transfers.

ctaFinale.subhead: Three ways to tell us what service you need.

meta.title: About · The story of Sicily Driver Syracuse | NCC Sicily
meta.description: Sicily Driver Syracuse was born from a passion for high-quality NCC services. Three bases (Syracuse, Noto, Marzamemi), a curated Mercedes fleet, English-speaking drivers.

hero.subhead: Three bases, a Mercedes fleet looked after like family, drivers who speak real English — not Google Translate English.

story.body1: Sicily Driver Syracuse is a young and dynamic company born from a passion for high-quality NCC and transfer services. With extensive experience in crafting personalised journeys, we provide tailored solutions for individuals and businesses seeking comfort and safety in their travels.
story.body2: Thanks to our carefully selected fleet and attention to detail, we guarantee punctuality and courtesy on every trip. Our team consists of transportation professionals who understand the specific needs of our clients, ready to support you 24/7 throughout your journey.
story.body3: Choosing Sicily Driver Syracuse means trusting a dedicated partner: from airport transfers and NCC services for events to private excursions and tours. We are by your side to make every journey enjoyable and worry-free.

beliefs.item1Body: From Catania to Marzamemi, fare agreed before departure. No hidden surcharges, no mysterious 'night rate'.
beliefs.item2Body: V-Class, GLB Premium, E-Class. Weekly mechanical checks, sanitised after every service. Cold water on board, always.
beliefs.item3Body: Our chauffeurs speak fluent Italian and English. They know the roads, the mass times in Modica, and where to actually eat well in Ortigia.

bases.base2Note: Operations base for Val di Noto tours
bases.base3Note: Support base for the south-east coast

ctaFinale.subhead: Three ways to tell us where to pick you up.

meta.title: Contact · Sicily Driver Syracuse | Phone, WhatsApp, email
meta.description: Contact Sicily Driver Syracuse: phone +39 375 641 3379, WhatsApp 24/7, email info@ncctaxisiracusa.com. Bases in Syracuse, Noto, Marzamemi.

hero.subhead: In Italian or English, via WhatsApp, phone or email. We reply within one hour, 24 hours a day.

ways.card1Note: Send us date, route and passenger count.
ways.card2Note: For urgent matters, imminent travel, last-minute confirmations.
ways.card3Note: For detailed requests, weddings, business, invoicing.

form.subhead: Four fields, that's it. We reply within an hour, even at night.
form.fieldMessagePlaceholder: When, from where, to where, how many people…
form.successBody: We'll reply within an hour. If it's urgent, message us on WhatsApp.
form.errorRequired: Please check the required fields and try again.

times.body: WhatsApp: within 1 hour, 24/7, including nights and holidays. Email: within 24 hours. Phone: always, around the clock.
times.businessNote: Weddings and events need a detailed quote: the first reply arrives within an hour with initial sizing, the full quote within 24 hours.
